summary: Iteration 15: Complete testing of Drilling Protocol Workflow feature. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working - Login, Implant tab navigation, 'Let Me Choose' flow (tooth selection, system dropdown, bone measurements, Find Best Implant, implant selection, Give Drilling Protocol button, Generate Protocol with bone density, step-by-step drill display, navigation, Export PDF button present), 'Suggest Me' flow (procedure selection, bone type, measurements, suggested systems with selectable implants, Give Drilling Protocol button).
critical_code_review_comments: All drilling protocol endpoints properly protected with authentication (returns 403 for unauthenticated requests)
Protocol generation correctly distinguishes between bone densities (D1-D4) and generates Conventional vs Reduced protocols
PDF export endpoint generates valid PDF files with correct content-type headers
Frontend correctly shows 'Give Drilling Protocol' button only after user selects an implant
Step navigation (Previous/Next) works correctly on Drilling Protocol screen
Timeline visualization correctly highlights current step
Both 'Let Me Choose' and 'Suggest Me' flows successfully navigate to Drilling Protocol screen
Implant selection in both flows uses radio button selection UI with proper visual feedback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Drilling Protocol Workflow feature fully tested. Available drilling protocol systems: BioHorizons Tapered Pro, BioHorizons Tapered Short. Both 'Let Me Choose' and 'Suggest Me' flows lead to drilling protocol. Protocol generation requires bone density selection (D1-D4). D4 bone generates 'Reduced Protocol'. Export PDF button is present and functional. Back button returns to implant selection results.

steps: Select tooth from FDI chart (tested with tooth 46)
Open system dropdown modal, select BioHorizons – Tapered Pro
Enter bone width (7) and bone height (12)
Results show Top N Implants with 'Show More' if >5
Tap implant to select (shows radio button highlight)
'Give Drilling Protocol' button appears after selection
Results show Top 5 Systems with selectable implant sizes
'Give Drilling Protocol' button appears after selection

elements: Header with back arrow and 'Drilling Protocol' title
Implant info card (brand, system, diameter x length, tooth)
Active drill card with step details (diameter, depth, drill code, speed, irrigation)
Quick Reference list of all steps

backend_endpoints.GET /api/drilling-protocols/available: Returns list of available protocol systems
backend_endpoints.POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate: Generates drilling protocol for implant + bone density
